dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_threat} struck this morning and made off with the {quest_focus}. The trail is still fresh but it will not last.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need someone who can {quest_action} before the trail goes cold. {quest_ally} spotted tracks heading {location_hint}. The {enemy_type} that escorted them are still in the area: hunt them down and make sure this does not happen again.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} at risk if word spreads that we cannot protect our own.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_threat} attacked the {quest_stakes} at first light and fled before anyone could respond. The {quest_focus} left signs heading into the wilds.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} and deal with this before it circles back. The {enemy_type} was last seen {location_hint}. Track them down and eliminate the threat before it returns.
dialogueChunks.outro: This must be done {quest_time_pressure}. The longer we wait, the more dangerous it becomes.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} not been seen. {player_name}, the {quest_focus} {quest_focus_was} left wide open and something got through.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need you to {quest_action}. Tracks lead {location_hint}. Whatever broke through is still out there, and the {enemy_type} have been emboldened by the gap in our defenses. Find them and put them down before they strike again.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_has} a gap until we sort this out. Every hour matters.
